articles.title: Meet Cardano’s new decentralized governance: Voltaire
articles.description: Cardano has officially moved into its next phase, the Voltaire era, with the Chang hard fork taking place on September 1. This upgrade is all about governance—giving more power to ADA holders and letting them take charge of decisions that affect the entire network. articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Praises Cardano Over Bitcoin After Chang Hardfork
articles.description: On Sunday, September 1, the Cardano blockchain successfully conducted the Chang hardfork upgrade entering the Voltaire era of decentralized governance. This makes Cardano one of the first major blockchain networks to implement a token-based governance system. The blockchain’s CEO Charles Hoskinson said that Cardano’s recent upgrade puts it above Bitcoin in matters of decentralization. Charles...
